name: Low Fat Oriental Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: Cooked and cubed chicken from 3 skinless boneless chicken breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mayonnaise mixture together in a separate bowl and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, mix the remaining ingredients together and add the mayo mixture. You may want to add almonds and grapes right before serving. This recipe yields 9 servings, with each serving containing approximately 115 calories and 4 grams of fat.
